scripts.mac: bun run build && env $(cat .env | xargs) SYNC_OS_KEYS=mac,mac_arm64 SA_SHOW_REPLAY=false bun ./scripts/syncVersions.js
scripts.win: bun run build && env $(cat .env | xargs) SYNC_OS_KEYS=win32,win64 SA_SHOW_REPLAY=false bun ./scripts/syncVersions.js
scripts.linux: bun run build && env $(cat .env | xargs) SYNC_OS_KEYS=linux SA_SHOW_REPLAY=false bun ./scripts/syncVersions.js
